main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/1.06|1.06]] |gameversion=1.06 |date=June 26, 2024 |summary='''M. Bison Release'''. Minor balance changes and bug fixes. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/battle_change/20240626 Patch Notes] }} == M. Bison Patch == * M. Bison released
== '''Universal Changes''' == * '''Perfect Parry vs. Projectiles''' ** No longer resets the player's Dash input, allowing for immediate Perfect Parry ~ Forward Dash with a 6{{clr|M|MPMK}}~6 input * '''{{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}}''' ** Fixed bug where a trade could cause a KO at low health * '''Drive Parry''' ** Fixed issue where moves that cause a screen shake would not trigger it when parried * '''Taunts''' ** Modern Controls input changed from {{clr|L|L}}+{{clr|M|M}}+{{clr|H|H}}+{{clr|DR|SP}} → {{clr|L|L}}+{{clr|M|M}}+{{clr|H|H}}+{{clr|DR|SP}}+DP+Assist * '''Back Rise (Wakeup)''' ** Fixed issue where holding 2 buttons before a knockdown occurred could result in an unintentional Back Rise on wakeup
== '''Key Character Changes''' == === '''A.K.I.''' === * {{clr|M|5MP}} ** Expanded collision box upward to prevent unintended side switches in juggles
=== '''Akuma''' === * {{clr|M|Tenmaku Blade Kick}} ({{clr|M|j.2MK}}) ** Fixed bug where combo scaling was reduced when it hit immediately before landing * {{clr|M|Viscera Piercer}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|M|MP}}) ** 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both {{clr|M|MP}}+{{clr|M|MK}} (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}}) * {{clr|H|Bone Crusher Axe Kick}} ({{clr|M|5MK}}~{{clr|H|HK}}) ** 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both {{clr|H|HP}}+{{clr|H|HK}} (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a {{clr|DR|DI Cancel}}) * Block Recovery of Various Attacks ** Fixed issue where Akuma could cancel his recovery on Block earlier than intended with certain actions ** Applies to {{clr|H|6HP}}~{{clr|H|6HP}}, {{clr|L|214LK}}, and {{clr|L|214LP}}~{{clr|L|6P}} * Gou Shoryuken (623P) ** Fixed bug where Drive Gain on Perfect Parry was less than intended * Tatsumaki Zanku-Kyaku (214K) ** Fixed bug where Drive Gain on Perfect Parry was less than intended * Zanku Hadoken (j.236P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) ** Hurtbox expanded forward ** Upper half of hitbox changed to combo-only hitbox (easier to jump over or counter with anti-air specials) * Ashura Senku (6KKK/4KKK) ** Hurtbox expanded during Teleport movement ** Will no longer completely overlap with a cornered opponent ** These changes make it harder for a Teleport to avoid attacks when Akuma has not fully passed through the opponent * {{clr|SA|Shun Goku Satsu (CA)}} ({{clr|L|LP}}~{{clr|L|LP}}~{{clr|L|6LK}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) ** Fixed issue where the opponent's charge timing would be reset during the cinematic side switch
=== '''Blanka''' === * {{clr|M|2MK}} ** Fixed issue where the extra whiff recovery and expanded hurtbox from Version 1.05 did not apply while {{clr|SA|SA2}} was active * Raid Jump (Modern Controls: 2{{clr|M|M}}{{clr|H|H}}~{{clr|M|M}}/{{clr|H|H}}) ** Fixed issue where Modern Blanka could not perform an Air Throw using the Throw button * Rolling Attack / Vertical Rolling Attack ([4]6P / [2]8K) ** Fixed issue where the opponent would not be pushed back on block while Blanka is rebounding
=== '''Dee Jay''' === * {{clr|M|Threebeat Combo 1}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) ** 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both {{clr|M|MP}}+{{clr|M|MK}} (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}}) * {{clr|M|MK}}/{{clr|H|HK}} Jackknife Maximum ([2]8{{clr|M|MK}}/{{clr|H|HK}}) ** Now throw invuln on frames 5-6
=== '''Ed''' === * {{clr|H|Assist Combo 3}} ** Fixed issue where the input buffer did not work if stopped after the initial {{clr|H|5H}} ({{clr|H|5HP}}) and then restarted again * {{clr|H|Body Blow Combination}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) ** 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both {{clr|H|HP}}+{{clr|H|HK}} (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a {{clr|DR|DI Cancel}}) * {{clr|M|Hitman Combination 1}} ({{clr|M|5MK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) ** 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both {{clr|M|MP}}+{{clr|M|MK}} (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}}) * {{clr|H|Low Smash Combination}} ({{clr|H|2HK}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) ** 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both {{clr|H|HP}}+{{clr|H|HK}} (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a {{clr|DR|DI Cancel}})
=== '''E. Honda''' === * {{clr|OD|OD Sumo Smash}} ({{clr|OD|[2]8KK}}) ** Now throw invuln on frames 5-13
=== '''Jamie''' === * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Drive Damage on Block reduced by 200 ** Opponent's Drive Gain on Parry reduced by 2000 ** Version 1.05 caused {{clr|SA|SA1}} to gain an extra hit, so these changes restore the values to their previous version
=== '''JP''' === * {{clr|M|Assist Combo 2}} ** Now activates {{clr|SA|SA2}} when {{clr|OD|OD Stribog}} is blocked or absorbed by armor
=== '''Juri''' === * {{clr|H|Death Crest 1}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|4HP}}) ** 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both {{clr|H|HP}}+{{clr|H|HK}} (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a {{clr|DR|DI Cancel}}) * {{clr|OD|OD Fuhajin}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}) ** Version 1.05 reduced the startup time, but failed to adjust various properties (Fuha Stock timing, projectile clash, proximity guard) to match the faster startup ** Fuha stock obtained 14f → 12f ** Projectile clash hitbox appears 12f → 10f ** Proximity guard hitbox starts 7f → 5f and expanded to match the full range of the attack hitbox
=== '''Ken''' === * Quick Dash (KK) ** Now only takes priority over {{clr|OD|OD}} kick specials when all 3 Kick buttons are pressed ** In Version 1.05, any 5KK input would cause Quick Dash to take priority, even after inputting the command for a special move
=== '''Kimberly''' === * {{clr|OD|OD Sprint}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) ** Fixed bug that would cause sound effect not to play * Bushin Senpukyaku (214K) ** Added Throw Invuln to the 1st hit, starting on the 2nd active frame for each version ** {{clr|L|214LK}} now throw invuln on frames 7-11 ** {{clr|M|214MK}} now throw invuln on frames 8-12 ** {{clr|H|214HK}} now throw invuln on frames 9-13 ** {{clr|OD|214KK}} now throw invuln on frames 7-11
=== '''Luke''' === * {{clr|L|Assist Combo 1}} ** Input is now accepted during the chain cancel window
=== '''Marisa''' === * {{clr|L|Assist Combo 1}} ** Input is now accepted during the chain cancel window
=== '''Rashid''' === * {{clr|H|HP Spinning Mixer}} ({{clr|H|236HP}} Regular/Enhanced) ** Now throw invuln on frames 8-10
=== '''Zangief''' === * {{clr|M|5MK}} ** Attack hitbox reverted to its pre-1.05 version, slightly reducing its range * {{clr|H|Tundra Storm}} (Modern Controls: {{clr|H|22H}}) ** Fixed issue where a previous input leniency adjustment was not applied to Modern controls
